title: One Battle After Another sweeps the Oscars as Michael B Jordan and Jessie Buckley win big
summary_full: Paul Thomas Anderson’s revolutionary epic took home six awards while Sinners scored four including for best actorOscar winners 2026: the full listIn pictures: Jessie Buckley, Michael B Jordan and Jacob Elordi at the afterpartiesPaul Thomas Anderson’s counter-culture caper One Battle After Another has won the Oscars war, taking home six awards after a hotly contested season.The big-budget comedy thriller, inspired by Thomas Pynchon’s Vineland, was named best picture and also won director, supporting actor for Sean Penn, adapted screenplay, editing and the first ever Oscar for casting, a category long-petitioned for within the industry. Continue reading...
